findings.title: Missing try/catch around completeIncrement in batch loop
findings.issue: completeIncrement() was not wrapped in try/catch. If it threw (vs returning false), remaining batch IDs would not be processed.
findings.fix: Added try/catch around completeIncrement() call with error logging
